listening.title: Listening: Review — An achievement
listening.transcript: I have already finished my first book. I have worked on it since I was in university. It has just been published last month.

questions.question: When was the book published?
questions.explanation: "it has just been published last month."

listening.title: Listening: A weather plan
listening.transcript: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home. If it is sunny, we will go to the beach instead.

questions.question: What will they do if it rains?
questions.explanation: "If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home."
